While stocks last."],"title":"Terms and Conditions"},"promotionTag":{"bgColor":"#557FFF","outlineColor":"#557FFF","textColor":"#FFFFFF","tagName":"SPECIAL OFFER"}},{"promotionTitle":"Get your new device protected with Maxis Device Care and enjoy the first 3-months on us.","promotionDescription":"Select your preferred Maxis Device Care plan on the cart page before checkout to accept offer.","promotionMoreInformation":{"buttonText":"OKAY","description":["
  1. What is Maxis Device Care Program?
    Maxis Device Care Program is a device protection Program that offers insurance coverage for your brand-new device(s) purchased via Maxis.

  2. What are my devices protected against and what are the different plans under Maxis Device Care Program?
    Maxis Device Care Program protects your device(s) against accidental damage, liquid damage, screen crack* and/ or attended theft by repair* or replacement with a new or refurbished device, depending on the plan selected. (*screen crack damage is by repair only)

  3. How do I subscribe to Maxis Device Care Program?
    You may subscribe to Maxis Device Care Program through these touchpoints:
    • On Maxis Online Store, select your preferred Maxis Device Care before you checkout
    • At any Maxis Stores (at the point of purchasing your device) OR;
    • Call us at 123 (strictly within 7 days after purchasing your new device from Maxis).

Please refer to Maxis Device Care info page or our FAQ for more details.
